## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] I added or updated tests for my change
- [ ] I kept the plugin's host scripts **dependency-free** (no new npm deps under `plugin/`)
- [ ] If I touched `connect.js`, I updated **both** copies (they must stay byte-identical)
- [ ] If I touched redaction (`plugin/lib/redact.js`), I added test cases
- [ ] Docs updated if the change affects usage
